---
title: "Cleaning the covariates"
author: "Ali Khan Faizee"
date: "2026-04-03"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

### Road length

Let's start with preparing the road length per grid covariates. We have
alsready calculated the length of roads in the grids with QGIS, now will
add them to the grid data

```{r}
# load libraries and data
library(sf)
library(dplyr)
library(stringr)
road_length <- read.csv("spatial-data/road-length-analysis/road-length-data.csv")
head(road_length)

# Join to covariates
covariates <- read.delim("data/processed/covariates-full-elevation-filtered.txt", sep = "\t")

covariates_road <- covariates %>%
  dplyr::left_join(
    road_length %>% select(fid, length_roa),
    by = c("grid.id" = "fid")
    
  )
## let us loose the useless columns in the covariates 

covariates_road <- covariates_road %>% select(-mean_elev.x, -elev_band.x, -geometry.x)
covariates_road <- covariates_road %>% mutate(mean_elev = mean_elev.y, elev_band = elev_band.y, geometry = geometry.y) %>% select(-mean_elev.y, -elev_band.y, -geometry.y)
write.table(covariates_road, "data/processed/covariates-full-elevation-roads.txt", sep = "\t")
```

troubleshoot

```{r}
# Check CRS of both layers
st_crs(roads) == st_crs(grids_sf)

# Check bounding boxes — do they overlap?
st_bbox(roads)
st_bbox(grids)

# Step 1 — transform roads to WGS84 to match grids
roads <- st_transform(roads, crs = 4326)

# Verify bounding boxes now match
st_bbox(roads)

# Quick visual check — do they plot on top of each other?

plot(st_geometry(grids_sf))
plot(st_geometry(roads), add = TRUE, col = "red")
```

Lets try this pipeline

```{r}

# Make sure both are in UTM 46N
roads_proj <- st_transform(roads, crs = 32646)
grids_proj <- st_transform(grids_sf, crs = 32646)

# Fix geometries
roads_proj <- st_make_valid(roads_proj)
grids_proj <- st_make_valid(grids_proj)

# Initialize results dataframe
results <- data.frame(fid = integer(), road_length_m = numeric())

# Loop through each grid one by one
for (i in 1:nrow(grids_proj)) {
  
  # Get single grid
  single_grid <- grids_proj[i, ]
  fid_val     <- single_grid$fid
  
  # Intersect roads with this grid
  roads_clipped <- tryCatch(
    st_intersection(roads_proj, single_grid),
    error = function(e) NULL   # if intersection fails, return NULL
  )
  
  # Calculate total road length in this grid
  if (is.null(roads_clipped) || nrow(roads_clipped) == 0) {
    total_length <- 0
  } else {
    total_length <- sum(as.numeric(st_length(roads_clipped)), na.rm = TRUE)
  }
  
  # Append to results
  results <- rbind(results, data.frame(fid = fid_val, road_length_m = total_length))
  
  # Progress tracker
  cat("Processed grid", i, "of", nrow(grids_proj), "| fid:", fid_val, "| length:", round(total_length, 1), "m\n")
}

# Check results
head(results)
summary(results$road_length_m)
sum(results$road_length_m == 0)   # how many grids have no roads
```
